subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.27
question_html:
In which set are the salts arranged in order of increasing pH?

A.  HCOONH4 < KBr < NH4Br < HCOOK

B.  KBr < NH4Br < HCOOK < HCOONH4

C.  NH4Br < HCOONH4 < KBr < HCOOK

D.  HCOOK < KBr < HCOONH4 < NH4Br
examiners_html: Not very well done in identifying the set of ionic compounds that were arranged in correct order of increasing pH, with no clear misconception based on the other choices.
